negative_constraints: no readable words, logos, filenames, labels, numbers, or alphanumeric callouts inside the image
no dashboard, browser chrome, social post layout, app store branding, card grid, cabinet, shelf, desk, gallery wall, or prop inventory

avoid ceramic plinths, billiard surfaces, optical drafting thresholds, foundry sections, fog corridors, and glazed habitat language

no equal-weight grid of source objects
no unrelated replacement image or metaphorical scene when a source image is attached
